mapper.select: SELECT ID, GOODS_NAME FROM GOODS_LIST WHERE STATUS = 0 ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT #{pstartno}, 10000
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MASTER_GOODS_WORDING (MASTER_GOODS_ID, COUNTRY_ID, WORD1, WORD2, REG_DT, UPT_DT) VALUES (#{masterGoodsId}, 1, #{word1}, #{word2}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM GOODS_LIST WHERE STATUS = 0
SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM GOODS_LIST WHERE STATUS = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MASTER_GOODS (ID, BRAND_ID, MASTER_CODE, GOODS_NAME, GOODS_TYPE, REFINE_TYPE, IMAGE_URL, REG_DT) VALUES (#{id}, 0, #{masterCode}, #{goodsName}, 1, 0, #{imageUrl}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE GOODS_LIST SET STATUS = 1 WHERE ID = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MASTER_GOODS WHERE ID = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(ID) FROM MASTER_GOODS_WORDING WHERE MASTER_GOODS_ID = #{id}

SELECT A.ID AS id, A.WORD1 AS word1, A.WORD2 AS word2, B.GOODS_NAME AS goodsName FROM MASTER_GOODS_WORDING A INNER JOIN MASTER_GOODS B ON A.MASTER_GOODS_ID = B.ID INNER JOIN GOODS_LIST C ON C.ID = B.ID WHERE C.STATUS = 1 ORDER BY ID ASC LIMIT #{pstartno}, 10000
